title: Item A — Extend resource-access.schema.json credentialItem with livenessProbe
description: Additive backwards-compatible extension to luh-tech/schema-registry/schemas/resource-access.schema.json adding livenessProbe optional object on credentialItem definition. Schema version bumps 1.0.0 -> 1.1.0 per minor-bump-for-additive convention exercised in PR #102 (terraform-state enum extension) and PR #106 (vpcPeerings extension). Resolves FU-SR-RESOURCE-ACCESS-CREDENTIAL-LIVENESS-FIELD-1 filed in SR register 2026-06-02 via D-EB-FU-FILE (PR #103). Substrate driver: two BW items (d3ef349b DO_SPACES_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY_PROD + 8adf7118 DO_BUCKET_ECTROPY_MIGRATE) are structurally complete but fail at DO auth with InvalidAccessKeyId; current credentialItem schema captures rotation policy + lastRotated + trackedByFollowUp but has no field for empirical reachability — dead credentials look identical to live ones in the graph. Shape per chat-side sandbox decisions 2026-06-03 (Erik approved as written): lastVerifiedReachable optional/nullable date-time, lastVerifiedResult required enum (success, auth-failed, network-failed, not-tested), verifiedBy optional/nullable free-form string (deliverable-id or operator). Mirrors existing rotation block pattern in credentialItem: additionalProperties false, optional nested object, properties carry FK or descriptive content. Unblocks EB Cat 3b drift-liveness tool (deferred from Cat 3 partial d-2026-06-03-eb-agent-cat3-coverage-drift-tools-partial OUT-1, paired with already-merged Item B vpcPeerings to fully unblock Cat 3b). This deliverable also folds in 3 meta-FU entries (open) captured from substrate-hygiene observations across the PR #106 + PR #107 arc: ajv -r invocation normalization (P2), schema version bump refs-rebuild dispatch pattern (P2), future audit-paint constraint adoption for resource-access (P3). Dispatch shape applies both PR #106 lessons: include -r flag in all ajv invocations, include schemas/schema-refs.json refs rebuild as 4th in-scope file by default.

outputs.description: Schema extension on schemas/resource-access.schema.json. Two edits applied atomically: (1) version field bumped 1.0.0 -> 1.1.0; (2) new property livenessProbe added under definitions.credentialItem.properties as optional nested object (not added to credentialItem.required). livenessProbe shape: type object, additionalProperties false, required [lastVerifiedResult], properties: lastVerifiedReachable (type [string, null], format date-time, description ISO 8601 timestamp of last reachability probe), lastVerifiedResult (type string, enum success/auth-failed/network-failed/not-tested, description result of last reachability probe), verifiedBy (type [string, null], description deliverable-id or operator that performed the probe). Existing credentialItem fields (itemId, role, secretRef, field, rotation, itemName) preserved exactly. credentialItem.additionalProperties remains false. credentialItem.required remains [itemId, role] — livenessProbe is optional.
acceptanceCriteria: schemas/resource-access.schema.json version field is 1.1.0
schemas/resource-access.schema.json definitions.credentialItem.properties.livenessProbe exists with type=object
livenessProbe.additionalProperties is false
livenessProbe.required is [lastVerifiedResult]
livenessProbe.properties.lastVerifiedResult.enum is [success, auth-failed, network-failed, not-tested]
livenessProbe.properties.lastVerifiedReachable.format is date-time and type allows null
livenessProbe.properties.verifiedBy type allows null
credentialItem.required remains [itemId, role] (livenessProbe optional)
credentialItem.additionalProperties remains false
All other credentialItem fields preserved exactly (itemId, role, secretRef, field, rotation, itemName)
Schema validates as draft-07 with ajv-cli@5.0.0 compile invocation including -r for external $ref schemas (--strict=false -c ajv-formats)
Existing instances (if any) continue to validate against bumped schema (backwards-compatible verified)

outputs.description: Four FU touches in .roadmap/follow-up-register.json atomic in same PR: (a) FU-SR-RESOURCE-ACCESS-CREDENTIAL-LIVENESS-FIELD-1 close (resolution.closedDate=2026-06-03, closedDuring=d-2026-06-03-sr-resource-access-credential-liveness-probe, summary documents schema-extension resolution path); (b) file FU-SR-AJV-COMPILE-INVOCATION-NORMALIZATION-1 (P2, open, scope: normalize ajv compile/validate invocations across SR workflows and dispatches to include -r flag for external $ref resolution; substrate evidence: PR #106 Step 2 ajv compile failed missing -r flag, workflow CI paths use different invocation that resolves refs correctly but standalone compile/validate fails); (c) file FU-SR-SCHEMA-VERSION-BUMP-REFS-REBUILD-DISPATCH-PATTERN-1 (P2, open, scope: future schema version bump dispatches must include schemas/schema-refs.json rebuild as 4th in-scope file by default to clear refs-check CI; substrate evidence: PR #106 required 4th-file scope expansion mid-dispatch to clear refs-check failure); (d) file FU-SR-RESOURCE-ACCESS-AUDIT-PAINT-CONSTRAINT-FUTURE-1 (P3, open, scope: consider whether resource-access.schema.json should adopt forbidden-audit-paint-names allOf constraint and rename auditTrail to structured-changes block; defer until governance-vs-content schema boundary policy clarifies). Net follow-up count change: 15 -> 18 (3 new opens + 1 close = 3 net adds). meta.totalCount: 15 -> 18.

transitions.trigger: Spec authored after substrate-read on SR main a15799f (post-D-SR-CAT3-AMEND PR #107). credentialItem current shape verified: additionalProperties false, required [itemId, role], existing rotation block is the precedent pattern (additionalProperties false, optional nested object). EB-proposed livenessProbe shape from canvas F0B7UB6BGR4 confirmed clean against current schema — adds without breaking. Three shape decisions confirmed by Erik 2026-06-03 ('verified as approved as written'): lastVerifiedReachable optional/nullable, lastVerifiedResult required enum with not-tested as initial-state value, verifiedBy optional/nullable free-form. Two PR #106 dispatch lessons applied: -r flag in all ajv invocations (resolves Step 2 compile pattern), schemas/schema-refs.json in scope from Step 0 (resolves refs-check CI failure pattern). Four FU touches folded into OUT-2: 1 close + 3 file-open meta-observations from PR #106 + #107 substrate-hygiene observations.

notes: Final canvas F0B7UB6BGR4 deliverable. After this merges, EB Cat 3b unblocks fully — both drift-liveness (this) and drift-vpcpeering (PR #106) preconditions met. Schema version bump pattern continued: minor for additive backwards-compatible (resource-access 1.0.0 -> 1.1.0). Filed-and-closed FU pattern from PR #102 + PR #106 reused for FU-SR-RESOURCE-ACCESS-CREDENTIAL-LIVENESS-FIELD-1. Three meta-FUs filed open capture substrate-hygiene observations from PR #106 + PR #107 dispatch authoring misses — they will be addressed in future arcs. Item B vpcPeerings already merged at PR #106; Cat 3 amendment merged at PR #107; this PR closes the canvas F0B7UB6BGR4 work entirely. EB Cat 3b is the next downstream consumer — once EB authors that, the Cat 3 full surface (22 -> 31 tools) lands and the cross-chat coordination loop demonstrated this session reaches steady state. Dispatch shape applies both PR #106 lessons explicitly: Step 2 includes -r in ajv compile; Step 4 runs luhtech-schema refs rebuild before commit, avoiding the refs-check CI failure pattern.
